misc.title: #ONEPIECE1179 Imu not girl. Imu is guy. Imu have tattoo of eye on hand. Imu bleed a little. Imu has black cloud and black ring veil behind him. Many rinnegan eyes on veil. Imu sitting on elbaf house s
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1179 Imu not girl. Imu is guy. Imu have tattoo of eye on hand. Imu bleed a little. Imu has black cloud and black ring veil behind him. Many rinnegan eyes on veil. Imu sitting on elbaf house shape like pyramid (aurafarming). Double spread for imu. Imu sword is weird sword. not normal sword. 🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1179 I think Imu is a Lunarian(fallen one reference to Lucifer) and also has ancient giant blood(horns), a reason why he tries so hard to copy Lunarians/Ancient Giants, making a army of both(
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1179 I think Imu is a Lunarian(fallen one reference to Lucifer) and also has ancient giant blood(horns), a reason why he tries so hard to copy Lunarians/Ancient Giants, making a army of both(Seraphim). At least my theory on it. WorstGenHQ (@WorstGenHQ) #ONEPIECE1179 🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥 — https://nitter.net/WorstGenHQ/status/2038600980632105472#m

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1179 When Imu lands on Elbaph, he spits blood and falls to his knees, then transforms and we see his design. (My theory that he can't leave Holy Land for long because of a curse might actuall
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1179 When Imu lands on Elbaph, he spits blood and falls to his knees, then transforms and we see his design. (My theory that he can't leave Holy Land for long because of a curse might actually be true.) 🔥🔥🔥🔥

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1179 Imu is a male with a handsome face, long white hair(curly similar to Nika), wings, tanned skin, horns, white tattoos on his skin, a sword and a devil tail. Intro box: One of the Twenty F
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1179 Imu is a male with a handsome face, long white hair(curly similar to Nika), wings, tanned skin, horns, white tattoos on his skin, a sword and a devil tail. Intro box: One of the Twenty Founders Special Power: Devil Fruit King of the World Saint Nerona Imu

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1179 Gorosei tries to stop Imu and bringing up the option to send a Admiral to Elbaph or to go all five of them like they did in Egghead, but Imu calls them out and go anyway, they accept Imu
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1179 Gorosei tries to stop Imu and bringing up the option to send a Admiral to Elbaph or to go all five of them like they did in Egghead, but Imu calls them out and go anyway, they accept Imu request to go alone.

misc.title: In Spain, the race at Japan lost 49% of its live audience compared to 2025 2026: 63000 2025: 124000 2024: 137000 2023: 152000 2022: 143000 2019: 48000 2018: 33000 Señor de los Medios 🕵️‍♂️ (@MedF1osT
misc.text: In Spain, the race at Japan lost 49% of its live audience compared to 2025 2026: 63000 2025: 124000 2024: 137000 2023: 152000 2022: 143000 2019: 48000 2018: 33000 Señor de los Medios 🕵️‍♂️ (@MedF1osTV) ⚠️ El #JaponDAZNF1 🇯🇵 pierde un 49% de la audiencia en directo con respecto a 2025 ⚠️ 📉 La carrera reunió a 💥 63.000 espectadores y un 8.3% de share💥 👀 En algún momento conectaron 82.000 espect. ➕ Suma 188K en diferido. Lo más visto del día. 🔙 2025: 124.000 2024: 137.000 2023: 152.000 2022: 143.000 2019: 48.000 2018: 33.000 — https://nitter.net/MedF1osTV/status/2038553842711761023#m
